description: no-GROUP-BY COUNT(*) over an empty (no-match) input yields one row {n:0}
statements: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE name = "zzz_nonexistent"

description: no-GROUP-BY COUNT(field) over empty input yields 0
statements: SELECT COUNT(x) AS c, COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE name = "zzz_nonexistent"

description: no-GROUP-BY SUM/MIN/MAX/AVG over empty input yield null; COUNT yields 0
statements: SELECT SUM(x) AS s, MIN(x) AS mn, MAX(x) AS mx, AVG(x) AS av, COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE name = "zzz_nonexistent"

description: a GROUP BY over empty input yields NO rows (not one) -- the counterexample
statements: SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS n FROM default:contacts WHERE name = "zzz_nonexistent" GROUP BY name
